proceed_messages.title: WELL, ALRIGHT THEN...
proceed_messages.main_text: Most fighters prefer being strong AND tough.
proceed_messages.sub_text: But hey, maybe you'll intimidate enemies with your... charm?

proceed_messages.title: BOLD STRATEGY!
proceed_messages.main_text: Weak and frail fighters are certainly... unique.
proceed_messages.sub_text: The goblins will appreciate the easy target practice.

proceed_messages.title: UNCONVENTIONAL WARRIOR!
proceed_messages.main_text: Who needs muscles when you have... determination?
proceed_messages.sub_text: Let's hope determination blocks sword swings.

proceed_messages.title: INTERESTING CHOICE...
proceed_messages.main_text: Most wizards prefer being, you know, intelligent.
proceed_messages.sub_text: But perhaps you'll discover magic through sheer luck?

proceed_messages.title: UNCONVENTIONAL SCHOLAR!
proceed_messages.main_text: Book learning is overrated anyway, right?
proceed_messages.sub_text: Your spells might be... creative, if they work at all.

proceed_messages.title: BOLD ACADEMIC APPROACH!
proceed_messages.main_text: Who needs brains when you have confidence?
proceed_messages.sub_text: The magical academy will be... surprised by your application.

proceed_messages.title: CLUMSY THIEF AHEAD!
proceed_messages.main_text: Most rogues prefer being nimble and quick.
proceed_messages.sub_text: Your lockpicking might sound like a blacksmith at work.

proceed_messages.title: INTERESTING HEIST STRATEGY!
proceed_messages.main_text: Stealth is overrated when you're this... obvious.
proceed_messages.sub_text: The guards will hear you coming from three towns away.

proceed_messages.title: UNCONVENTIONAL CRIMINAL!
proceed_messages.main_text: Who needs agility when you have... enthusiasm?
proceed_messages.sub_text: Your victims might die laughing instead of fear.

proceed_messages.title: DIVINE COMEDY AHEAD!
proceed_messages.main_text: Most clerics prefer being wise and perceptive.
proceed_messages.sub_text: Your deity might be... confused by your prayers.

proceed_messages.title: FAITHFUL BUT FOOLISH!
proceed_messages.main_text: Wisdom is just a suggestion anyway, right?
proceed_messages.sub_text: Your healing spells might need some divine intervention.

proceed_messages.title: BLESSED SIMPLICITY!
proceed_messages.main_text: Sometimes the gods work in mysterious ways.
proceed_messages.sub_text: This might be one of those very mysterious times.
